heading: TRUST TERRITORY OF THE PACIFIC ISLANDS
label: 14 TRUST TERRITORY OF THE PACIFIC ISLANDS
notes: Termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific IslandsThe Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, which included the Northern Mariana Islands, the Federated States of Micronesia, the Marshall Islands, and Palau, terminated. The Trusteeship Agreement terminated with respect to the Republic of the Marshall Islands on , with respect to the Federated States of Micronesia and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands on , and with respect to the Republic of Palau on . See Proc. No. 5564, , 51 F.R. 40399, set out as a note under , and Proc. No. 6726, , 59 F.R. 49777, set out as a note under .Oct. 21, 1986Nov. 3, 1986Oct. 1, 1994Nov. 3, 1986Sept. 27, 1994section 1801 of this titlesection 1931 of this titleFor provisions relating to the Northern Mariana Islands, formerly set out as notes under , see chapter 17 (§ 1801 et seq.) of this title. For provisions relating to the Federated States of Micronesia, the Marshall Islands, and Palau, formerly set out as notes under , see chapter 18 (§ 1901 et seq.) of this title.section 1681 of this titlesection 1681 of this title
